scripts.db:migrate:local: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply casino-production --local --migrations-dir=./migrations
scripts.db:migrate:prod: npx wrangler d1 migrations apply casino-production --migrations-dir=./migrations
scripts.db:reset:local: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
scripts.user:deploy: cd user-site && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name user-site
scripts.admin:deploy: cd admin-site && npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name admin-site
scripts.install:all: npm run user:install && npm run admin:install
scripts.build:all: npm run user:build && npm run admin:build
scripts.deploy:all: npm run user:deploy && npm run admin:deploy
